narrative:
Precinct Mogadore Village (precinct in Portage County) has 748 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points.
